description_long: This chaise features a modern, rectangular silhouette with a low-profile design and a right-side backrest that extends partially along the length of the seat. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a smooth, dark gray fabric, providing a sleek and contemporary appearance. The base and sides are encased in a woven rattan or wicker material, adding a textured, natural element that contrasts with the upholstery. The legs are short and minimally visible, likely made of metal or wood, supporting the structure just above the ground. The chaise is designed for comfort and relaxation, suitable for outdoor or semi-outdoor urban environments such as patios, parks, or communal spaces. Its overall construction suggests durability and weather resistance, making it ideal for public or shared use.
description: A modern chaise with dark gray upholstery, a right-side backrest, and woven rattan sides, designed for comfort and style in urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: The chaise is seen from an angled front-left perspective, highlighting the broad seat, right-side backrest, and the woven rattan texture along the base and side.
description_view_1: Viewed directly from the right side, the woven rattan panel is fully visible, and the thickness of the backrest and seat is emphasized.
description_view_2: From the rear, the chaise's length and the continuous rattan weave along the side and back are prominent, with the backrest extending partially along the seat.
description_view_3: A head-on view from the foot of the chaise, showing the full width of the seat, the right-side backrest, and the clean, modern lines of the upholstery.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a straight, rectangular panel positioned on the right side of the chaise, with a consistent height and no visible segmentation or decorative elements. It is upholstered in the same dark gray fabric as the seat, providing a clean and modern look.
attribute_armrest_presence: There is no distinct armrest; the backrest extends partially along the right side, serving as a combined back and arm support.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and minimally visible, likely constructed from metal or wood, and finished in a dark color to blend with the base.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid dark gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, large seat cushion and a single backrest cushion, both attached and integrated into the frame, providing a streamlined and unified appearance.
